statements.__comment__: Merge ACTIVE_DEPLOYMENT edge from NaisApp to its active NaisDeployment
statements.query: MATCH (a:NaisApp)-[:HAS_DEPLOYMENT]->(d:NaisDeployment) WHERE d.is_active = true MERGE (a)-[r:ACTIVE_DEPLOYMENT]->(d) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
MATCH (a:NaisApp)-[r:ACTIVE_DEPLOYMENT]->(d:NaisDeployment) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted
